about.title: Revolutionizing Learning.
about.subtitle: At CourseMaster, we believe education shouldn't just be consumed—it should be experienced. We build tools that empower the next generation of digital pioneers.
about.mission_desc: To become the world's most accessible high-fidelity learning ecosystem, regardless of geographic or financial barriers.
about.values_subtitle: We operationalize these principles in every line of code we write and every lesson we curate.
about.value1_desc: We don't settle for average. Our content is battle-tested by industry experts.
about.value2_desc: Transparency is our default setting. We're honest about what you can achieve.
about.value3_desc: You're not just a student; you're part of a global collective of creators.
about.value4_desc: We care deeply about human potential and the impact of quality education.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: Everything you need to build a professional online academy without touching a single line of code.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Upload your videos, documents, and quizzes. Our intuitive builder helps you structure your curriculum in minutes.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Choose between one-time purchases, subscriptions, or tiered access. You have full control over your revenue.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Publish your academy with your own branding. Reach students across 190+ countries instantly.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Use advanced analytics to track student progress, engagement, and sales. Optimize for maximum growth.

contact.title: Let's start a conversation.
contact.subtitle: Have a question about our courses or need a custom solution for your team? We're here to help.
contact.sla_desc: Our global team ensures that no message goes unanswered. We typically respond faster than you can brew a cup of coffee.
contact.success_toast: Message sent successfully! Our team will contact you soon.
contact.error_toast: Failed to send message. Please try again later.

validation.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters

validation.message_min: Message must be at least 10 characters
